name: Bailu
desc: The High Elder of the Vidyadhara, who is also known as the "Healer Lady" on the Luofu.\nShe uses her unique medical science and the medical treatment that can only be provided by the Vidyadhara dragon race to save lives.

1.name: Ambrosial Aqua
1.desc: If the target ally's current HP is equal to their Max HP when Invigoration ends, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra Energy for this target.

2.name: Sylphic Slumber
2.desc: After using her Ultimate, Bailu's Outgoing Healing increases by an additional <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Omniscient Opulence
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Evil Excision
4.desc: Every healing provided by the Skill makes the recipient deal <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

5.name: Waning Worries
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Drooling Drop of Draconic Divinity
6.desc: Bailu can heal allies who received a killing blow <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> more time(s) in a single battle.

121101.name: Diagnostic Kick
121101.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Bailu's ATK to one designated enemy.
121101.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

121102.name: Singing Among Clouds
121102.desc: Heals a single ally for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Bailu's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. Bailu then heals random allies <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s). After each healing, HP restored from the next healing is reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
121102.simple_desc: Restores HP for a single ally, then heals random allies.

121103.name: Felicitous Thunderleap
121103.desc: Heals all allies for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Bailu's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.\nBailu applies Invigoration to allies that are not already Invigorated. For those already Invigorated, Bailu extends the duration of their Invigoration by 1 turn.\nThe effect of Invigoration can last for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This effect cannot stack.
121103.simple_desc: Restores HP for all allies, and grants them Invigoration, or prolongs the duration of their Invigoration.

121104.name: Gourdful of Elixir
121104.desc: After an ally target with Invigoration is hit, restores the ally's HP for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Bailu's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. This effect can trigger <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s).\nWhen Bailu's teammate receives a killing blow, they will not be <u>knocked down</u>. Bailu immediately heals the ally for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Bailu's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> HP. This effect can be triggered 1 time per battle.
121104.simple_desc: When an ally target with <color=#f29e38ff>Invigoration</color> is attacked, <color=#f29e38ff>restores HP</color> for the ally.\nWhen a teammate suffers a <color=#f29e38ff>killing blow</color>, Bailu <color=#f29e38ff>immediately restores their HP</color>. This effect can only trigger 1 time per battle.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

121106.name: Attack
121106.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

121107.name: Saunter in the Rain
121107.desc: After Technique is used, at the start of the next battle, all allies are granted Invigoration for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
121107.simple_desc: After this character uses Technique, at the start of the next battle, all allies are granted Invigoration.

1.point_desc: When Bailu heals a target ally above their normal Max HP, the target's Max HP increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns.
Characters with Invigoration receive <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> less DMG.
